mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_emotions (user_id, pleasure, arousal, dominance, mood_description, ai_type) VALUES (#{userId}, #{pleasure}, #{arousal}, #{dominance}, #{moodDescription}, #{aiType})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, pleasure, arousal, dominance, mood_description AS moodDescription, ai_type AS aiType, created_at AS createdAt FROM user_emotions WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_emotions WHERE user_id = #{userId}
